extensionShortName.description: Short extension name shown in narrow Chrome UI.

extensionDescription.message: Set your new tab to a custom URL, local file, browser page, or quiet blank page.
extensionDescription.description: Chrome Web Store and extension details description.

optionsIntro.message: Set the page Chrome opens for new tabs.

newTabUrlLabel.description: Label for the configured target URL field.

focusAddressBar.description: Focus mode option that keeps address bar workflow.

focusLoadedPage.description: Focus mode option that lets the destination page receive focus.

extensionThemeLabel.description: Label for extension-owned page theme setting.

themeSystem.description: Theme option that follows browser or operating system color scheme.

customBackgroundLabel.description: Checkbox label for custom blank and redirect screen background.

syncSettingsLabel.description: Checkbox label for Chrome sync storage.

incognitoUnsupportedShort.message: Incognito new tabs are not supported...

openOptionsButton.description: Button label for opening the options page.

extensionDetailsButton.description: Button label for opening Chrome extension details.

resetToDefault.message: Reset to Chrome's default new tab page.

fileUrlsAllowed.description: File URL access status when enabled.

fileUrlsOff.message: File URLs: off. Enable in Extension Details for local files.
fileUrlsOff.description: File URL access status when disabled.

incognitoUnsupported.message: Incognito new tabs: not supported by Chrome for New Tab override extensions.

invalidUrlTitle.description: New-tab fallback title for invalid configured URLs.

localFileAccessOffTitle.description: New-tab fallback title when file access is disabled.

localFileAccessOffBody.message: Enable Allow access to file URLs in this extension's Chrome details page, then open a new tab again.
localFileAccessOffBody.description: New-tab fallback body when file access is disabled.

newTabErrorTitle.description: New-tab fallback title for unexpected errors.

newTabErrorBody.message: The configured page could not be opened.
newTabErrorBody.description: New-tab fallback body for unexpected errors.

convertedWindowsPath.message: Converted a Windows path to a file:// URL.
convertedWindowsPath.description: URL normalization warning for Windows paths.

convertedFileBackslashes.message: Converted backslashes to a file:// URL.
convertedFileBackslashes.description: URL normalization warning for file URLs with backslashes.

addedHttps.message: Added https:// because no URL scheme was provided.
addedHttps.description: URL normalization warning for bare domains.

localFilesRequireToggle.message: Local files require Chrome's separate Allow access to file URLs toggle.
localFilesRequireToggle.description: URL normalization warning for local files.

anotherExtensionBlocked.message: Chrome may block pages from another extension.
anotherExtensionBlocked.description: URL normalization warning for chrome-extension URLs.

schemeMayBeBlocked.message: The $SCHEME$ scheme may be blocked by the browser.
schemeMayBeBlocked.description: URL normalization warning for uncommon schemes.

invalidUrlMessage.message: Enter a valid URL, local file path, browser page, or about:blank.
